[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Full BioRobyn Wheeler, PhD Vice President, Research & Workplace Trends 
 Robyn is the Vice President, Research & Workplace Trends at The Leader's Edge in charge of analyzing the evolving dynamics in the workplace to ensure the firm’s programming is on the cutting edge. With her background in research, Robyn has a keen eye for identifying emerging trends and organizational strategies to elevate leadership practices. Robyn is also an engaging facilitator and executive coach. 
 Kaitlin Emery Client Relations Project Manager 
 Kaitlin Emery is a Client Relations Project Manager at The Leader’s Edge. She provides project management, communications and administrative support, including maintaining marketing database, overseeing coaching engagement progress, and managing client programs and internal meetings.

[TITLE]: 2026 Forbes Vetted Best Product Awards: Meet The Experts - Forbes Vetted
[METADATA/INTRO]: N arrowing down 150 winners from hundreds of products for the 2026 Forbes Vetted Best Product Awards was a challenge, but thankfully, we had some help along the way. We consulted 26 industry experts across nine overarching product categories to...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Alexandra Wagner is an accomplished aesthetician with more than 20 years of expertise in advanced skincare and product development. She is the founder of the White Tiger Collection, a boutique line that blends clinical science with luxury minimalism to deliver results-driven care. Based in Los Angeles and Jupiter, Florida, Wagner is sought after for her transformative facials and trusted by a discreet clientele who value long-term skin health. 
 Avi Greengart is president and lead analyst at Techsponential, a market analysis and advisory firm focusing on consumer and end-user enterprise technology. Coverage includes smartphones and mobile computing, hybrid work, spatial computing (AR/VR) and the digital home. Prior to Techsponential, Greengart led market research teams at GlobalData, Current Analysis and Jupiter Research, and served as a product manager at Intel. He is based in New Jersey, though lately that means Newark Airport.

[TITLE]: Amazon.com: Michelle Gilbert: books, biography, latest update
[METADATA/INTRO]: Recently Visited Top Categories...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Hello, I’m Michelle. My journey started with a soul-stirring dream of becoming a doctor. As soon as I could I invested a significant amount of time studying and working in the medical field. Later my plan to become a doctor was put on hold when I decided to become a mother. It was during this time that I researched the healing power of herbs. This was such an eye-opening time in my life as continued my education in a different way. Today I am a trained Master Herbalist, Iridologist, Essential Oil Specialist, Health Coach, and Speaker. I have been practicing for more than 14 years and have identified proven protocols and products to help you with anxiety, hormonal issues, barriers to success, skincare challenges, weight loss, and so much more. We are here to cheer you on, support your healing journey, and help you find tips to create healthy habits in simple ways
